title: helianthemum viscidulum
intro: Helianthemum viscidulum, also known as sticky rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Helianthemum viscidulum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
